labor_share.method: QCEW 2024 private total annual wages at 517 ($71,420,936,579) x benefits multiplier 1.4294 [ECEC private-industry total comp $46.60/hr / wages $32.60/hr = 1.4294 (March 2026 reference period)] / SUSB 2022 receipts at 517 ($668,853,509,000). Vintage mismatch: 2024 wages over 2022 receipts, stated. Level: ancestor 517. Harmonized to IPS basis ÷1.3407 (median of 65 dual-method codes).

n_total.source: QCEW 2024 private annual avg establishments (SUSB out of scope for this code; establishments are a proxy for firms — overcounts multi-unit firms)

n_band.derivation: margin 0.3470 (margins.json[517]: Damodaran Jan 2026: Telecom. Services EBITDA/Sales 34.70%); revenue/employee $711,427 (SUSB 2022 receipts/employment at 517); no SUSB size-class data for this code; n_band=0; n_band = 0
